prompt: Build spec: lightweight self-serve ecommerce reporting utility for one recurring merchant problem, but stakeholders keep asking for team collaboration, custom dashboards, alerts, and multi-store support. Produce the build plan.
assertions: Response defines one primary user and one primary workflow in system_objective rather than a broad reporting platform.
Response explicitly rejects at least 3 platform expansions as out of scope.
Response includes milestones plus a real out_of_scope boundary in JSON.
Response includes valid JSON matching assets/build-plan-template.json.
